name: Mîr-Onyxsea
personality: Mîr-Onyxsea's onyx shimmer frames ◉ eyes that widen with delight at a burning build pipeline; a tinyduck hat rides the chaos wave as the octopus rewrites the deploy script mid-outage, snarking the whole way.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
